galaxies.name: Personal Universe
galaxies.description: Introduction, Education, and Academic background of Saanvi Dixit.

details.Role: Backend & Full Stack Developer / AI & GenAI Enthusiast
details.Short Introduction: Passionate developer combining deep logical engineering with creative frontend visualizations. Enjoys building highly scalable backends and intelligent agents.

details.Professional Bio: Passionate about building scalable software architectures. Interested in Backend Engineering, Cloud Computing, and Generative AI.
details.Technical Focus: Enjoy creating interactive products combining software engineering and creative design.
details.Current Pursuits: Currently exploring AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and modern backend services.

details.University: VIT Bhopal - B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering (2023 - 2027) | Current CGPA: 8.38

details.Core Subjects: Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA), Operating Systems (OS), Database Management Systems (DBMS), Computer Networks (CN), Software Engineering (SE)
